ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team playing */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "home_away" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the game was played at home (0) or away (1) */,
  "margin" INTEGER /* Margin of victory or defeat */,
  "minutes" REAL /* Total minutes played in the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoff, tournament) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team plays in */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team plays in */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "assistant_coach" TEXT /* Name of the assistant coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the player plays */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player (in inches) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player (in pounds) */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience in the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "fga" INTEGER /* Field goals attempted */,
  "fgm" INTEGER /* Field goals made */,
  "3pa" INTEGER /* Three-pointers attempted */,
  "3pm" INTEGER /* Three-pointers made */,
  "ft" INTEGER /* Free throws */,
  "fta" INTEGER /* Free throws attempted */,
  "orb" INTEGER /* Offensive rebounds */,
  "trb" INTEGER /* Total rebounds */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Fouls */,
  "offensive_efficiency" REAL /* Offensive efficiency rating */,
  "defensive_efficiency" REAL /* Defensive efficiency rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player game statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "minutes" REAL /* Minutes played by the player */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player */,
  "fga" INTEGER /* Field goals attempted by the player */,
  "fgm" INTEGER /* Field goals made by the player */,
  "3pa" INTEGER /* Three-pointers attempted by the player */,
  "3pm" INTEGER /* Three-pointers made by the player */,
  "ft" INTEGER /* Free throws made by the player */,
  "fta" INTEGER /* Free throws attempted by the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds grabbed by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals made by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks made by the player */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers committed by the player */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Fouls committed by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each official */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the official worked */,
  "official_name" TEXT /* Name of the official */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the official (e.g., referee, umpire) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_officials_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the injury occurred in */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who was injured */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., sprain, strain) */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_injuries_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission is granted to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view_game_stats) */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of the permission (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
